sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, toDate('2001-04-25'));
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (2, toDate('2009-07-08'));
SELECT id, event_date, toRelativeMonthNum(event_date) AS relative_month FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = toDate('2015-01-01') WHERE id = 1;
